headline: 《揭秘日》登顶热搜，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: ‘Jiemi Ri’ Tops Trends, New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐焦点：《揭秘日》蝉联热搜榜首，《曼达洛人与古古》等新片受关注。本周无新片上映，但多部大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment focus: ‘Jiemi Ri’ tops the trending list, while ‘The Mandalorian & Grogu’ and others draw attention. No new releases today, but several blockbusters are upcoming.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，市场静待暑期档高潮。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases this week; market awaits summer blockbuster peak.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将上映，粉丝期待值爆棚。
industryHighlights.en: ‘Spider-Man: Freshman Year’ coming soon, fans highly anticipate.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》真人版定档，经典IP再掀热议。
industryHighlights.en: ‘Avatar: The Last Airbender’ live-action set, classic IP sparks buzz.
